entry.title: New: Reso 25-204 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"APPOINTMENT OF A MEMBER TO THE COMMISSION ON CHILDREN AND YOUTH FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI" The purpose of this resolution is to consider the appointment of Cayla Rae Kutaka to the Commission on Children and Youth for a term expiring on March 31, 2026.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
